mapper.insert: insert into agent_tool_call(run_id, step_id, external_call_id, tool_code, status, input_json, output_json, idempotency_key, confirmation_required, started_at, finished_at, duration_ms, error_code, error_message, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values(#{runId}, #{stepId}, #{externalCallId}, #{toolCode}, #{status}, #{inputJson}, #{outputJson}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{confirmationRequired}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{durationMs}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.select: select * from agent_tool_call where run_id=#{runId} order by id
mapper.update: update agent_tool_call set step_id=#{stepId}, external_call_id=#{externalCallId}, status=#{status}, output_json=#{outputJson}, confirmation_required=#{confirmationRequired}, started_at=#{startedAt}, finished_at=#{finishedAt}, duration_ms=#{durationMs}, error_code=#{errorCode}, error_message=#{errorMessage}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_time=sysdate() where id=#{id}
update agent_tool_call set status='CANCELLED', finished_at=sysdate(), update_time=sysdate() where run_id=#{runId} and status in ('CREATED','RUNNING')
